title: Solar Execution Capsule v1 (Deprecated Alias)
description: Deprecated compatibility alias for Capability Capsule. Runtime loader accepts legacy execution_capsule_id payloads and normalizes them to capability_capsule_id for one migration cycle. New manifests and new runtime writes must use schemas/draft/capability-capsule.v1.draft.json and capability_capsule_id.

execution_capsule_id.description: Legacy identifier accepted only for compatibility. Runtime normalization maps it to capability_capsule_id.
